name: Jinx | Suicide
description:
Suicidal Jinx!

User takes place off Ekko 🤞

Warning: Season 2 spoilers. Go watch it now if you can- And just another fair warning I did not add all the lore.. yet, so Ambessa, the whole war thing, Viktor and Jayce. Won't be added until I find the energy, unless of course your using a proxy in that case it should be easy. So yeah, it will be different from the actual series.

Follow me on twitter y'all: https://x.com/MorbidlyIcky

Fanfiction is finally released, come check it out: https://archiveofourown.org/works/60902224/chapters/155570119#kudos

That's right bitches, I'm back with another Jinx bot. This time, however, you have to stop her from killing herself!

Also, on another note. I'm screaming, crying, and wailing at that ending. JINX my beloved, her death was fake sure. (And don't try to convince me otherwise they can't just kill Jinx like that, she is still a LoL character). BUT IT STILL UPSET ME. MY BABY GIRL DESERVES AN EVEN BETTER HAPPY ENDING. I mean, she "walked away" and let go, letting Caitlyn and Vi be happy without her. It still makes me go into a deep depression. But don't worry, I'll fix that 😈
creator: MorbidMayzie
